data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of pausing a subscription.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to pause a subscription while keeping the time slot reserved. However, the linked use case does not provide explicit evidence or details regarding the implementation of this functionality. As a result, it is unclear whether the requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: The requirement to pause a subscription and keep the slot reserved is not explicitly covered in the linked use case.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define API for pausing subscriptions
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API allows pausing a subscription while keeping the time slot reserved.
